items.title: Alibaba falls ~5% in Hong Kong after Anthropic accused it of "illicitly" accessing its AI models, taking its YTD fall to 33%; Xiaomi and Baidu fell 3%+ (Jeanny Yu/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Alibaba falls ~5% in Hong Kong after Anthropic accused it of "illicitly" accessing its AI models, taking its YTD fall to 33%; Xiaomi and Baidu fell 3%+ (Jeanny Yu/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Alibaba falls ~5% in Hong Kong after Anthropic accused it of "illicitly" accessing its AI models, taking its YTD fall to 33%; Xiaomi and Baidu fell 3%+ (Jeanny Yu/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 在 Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴“非法”访问其人工智能模型后，阿里巴巴在香港股价下跌约 5%，使其年初至今跌幅达到 33%；小米和百度下跌 3% 以上（Jeanny Yu/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 在 Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴“非法”访问其人工智能模型后，阿里巴巴在香港股价下跌约 5%，使其年初至今跌幅达到 33%；小米和百度下跌 3% 以上（Jeanny Yu/彭博社） / Alibaba falls ~5% in Hong Kong after Anthropic accused it of "illicitly" accessing its AI models, taking its YTD fall to 33%; Xiaomi and Baidu fell 3%+ (Jeanny Yu/Bloomberg)
